title: Simplex Modern Survival
description: This focuses on making the game more difficult providing an incentive to use the two main mods, Vic's point blank for powerful weapons and immersive engineering for mass ammo production
body:
# Simplex Modern Survival

 Focused mods
  - Vic's Point Blank
    - adds guns to the game because it is fun
  - Immersive Engineering
    -  provides a way to mass manufacture ammo for veriety guns

  Purpose for the other mods in the modpack
  - Increase difficulty of the game with verious mods to provide a reason to use guns
  - Increase number of mobs with blood moons to provide a reason to mass manufacturing ammo
  - Mobs attracted to player from farther ranges to balance out the weapons
  - Terralith, Dungeons and Taverns: terrain gen mod for terrain veriety
  - Other mods for game optimization for client and server side

If you have suggestions for mods to add or remove please leave them on this google forms. Thank you for playing: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScF_2agCfelwRxak8MWiCHI7k_mCRJ_NZ1RsiUQz4A9hlW53A/viewform?usp=header
